_provenance: 2026-07-19 session 019f6e76-5f8b-7633-8b19-d7cd457847fa; P-2026-044 and ADR 0013; owner portability correction
state_behavior: private sidecar candidates; durable promotion requires an explicit reviewed action
retention_behavior: 30-day raw-text scrub preview; apply is explicit; malformed timestamps are reported and retained
optional_dependencies: Python 3.12 or newer for the deterministic local CLI
Git only when selecting an explicit repository for a promotion diff
unsupported_cases: automatic prompt, transcript, tool-result, or repository ingestion
automatic edits, commits, pushes, pull requests, or instruction replacement
hosted state synchronization or multi-device merge
sandboxing untrusted commands or encrypting state independently of the operating system
